accounting_policies.basis_of_consolidation: All subsidiaries consolidated; intercompany balances eliminated

revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Deferred and recognized over the term of the franchise agreement (5-10 years)
revenue_recognition.royalties: Recognized based on contracted percentage of franchisee revenue as reported
revenue_recognition.construction: Percentage of completion method (costs incurred / total estimated costs)
revenue_recognition.advertising_fund: Contributions reported as revenue when related franchisee revenues occur; expenditures as incurred; excess accrued as unearned revenue
revenue_recognition.contract_costs: External broker costs and sales commissions capitalized and amortized over FA life. FY2024 amortization: $3,419,647. Closing capitalized amount: $12,683,884

useful_lives.leasehold_improvements: Lesser of useful life or lease term

goodwill_intangibles.goodwill: Not amortized. Tested annually (Aug 1) or when indicators present. Market multiple of EBITDA method. No impairment in 2024.

accounting_policies.impairment: Long-lived assets reviewed when indicators present. Undiscounted cash flow test, then fair value if impaired. No impairment charges reported.

leases.type: Operating leases for offices, copiers, equipment

income_taxes.rate_reconciliation_items: Permanent differences, temporary differences, NOLs, state/provincial rate differentials, tax adjustments

accounting_policies.cash_equivalents: Investments with initial maturity ≤3 months (money market funds, time deposits)
accounting_policies.restricted_cash: Cash restricted for marketing fund use. FY2024: $728,048
accounting_policies.inventories: Finished products, accessories, components at lower of cost (FIFO) or NRV. WIP: percentage of completion.
accounting_policies.deferred_revenue: Customer deposits (California Closets) and services not yet provided
accounting_policies.nci_accounting: Redeemable securities at greater of redemption amount or inception amount. Recorded outside equity. Formula price = fixed multiple of average annual EBITDA.

acquisitions_2024.description: 4 CertaPro franchises (CA, IL x3) + 1 Paul Davis franchise (CO)

new_accounting_standards.ASU_2024_03: Disaggregation of Income Statement Expenses — effective Jan 1, 2027
new_accounting_standards.ASU_2023_09: Improvements to Income Tax Disclosures — effective Jan 1, 2025
